summary: Quest Map feature testing complete. Backend (7/7 tests passed) and Frontend (all key features verified) testing successful. The Quest Map is a new full-page feature with 500+ quests in 21 categories, Canvas-based rendering with zoom/pan support, search, filtering, and quest completion functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/quests/progress correctly returns completed_quests array and quest_xp number
POST /api/quests/{quest_id}/complete properly adds quest to completed list and awards XP
Already completed quests return already_completed flag without adding XP
Quest progress persists in MongoDB users collection
Frontend Canvas rendering handles 500+ nodes with good performance
Zoom/pan functionality works smoothly with touch support
Search filters quests by name/description in real-time
Category dropdown shows all 21 categories with quest counts
Detail panel shows quest name, category, difficulty, description, XP, and action button
Different shapes (circle=easy, square=medium, triangle=hard, star=legendary) render correctly
Locked quests show lock icon, completed show checkmark
seed_data_creation: Created test user questmap_test@test.com via registration API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quest Map feature fully tested and working. Access via Dashboard -> Settings -> Gorev Haritasi button (data-testid='missions-btn'). Page URL: /quest-map. Key test IDs: quest-map-page, quest-map-canvas, quest-minimap, quest-search-input, quest-category-filter, quest-zoom-in, quest-zoom-out, quest-reset-view, quest-back-btn, quest-detail-panel, quest-complete-btn. Backend APIs: GET /api/quests/progress, POST /api/quests/{quest_id}/complete. Test user: questmap_test@test.com/test123

backend_api.GET /api/quests/progress: PASSED - Returns completed_quests array and quest_xp
backend_api.POST /api/quests/{quest_id}/complete: PASSED - Marks quest complete and awards XP
backend_api.multiple_quests: PASSED - Can complete multiple different quests

frontend_ui.category_filter: PASSED - Dropdown shows 21 categories with counts
frontend_ui.category_labels: PASSED - Labels visible above each category group
frontend_ui.node_shapes: PASSED - Circle, square, triangle, star shapes visible
frontend_ui.locked_nodes: PASSED - Lock icon shown on locked quests
frontend_ui.quest_detail_panel: PASSED - Shows name, category, difficulty, description, XP, complete button
frontend_ui.legend: PASSED - Shows Kolay, Orta, Zor, Efsanevi, Bitti labels with colors

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real - no mocked endpoints
